title: Typos style
body:
## Description

The purpose of this PR is improve the code quality. At this time I used [black](https://github.com/psf/black) as code formatter, keeping the maximum length of the line as 79.

# Changes
Just 4 files were modified:

* podman/api_connection.py
* podman/system/__ init __.py
* podman/images/__ init __.py
* podman/errors/__ init __.py

comments.body: @danvergara CI seems unhappy let me take a look.  I'm okay with using the `black` formatter as long as no-one has objections.
@jwhonce thanks for the response. Yes, something is failing, but I don't know why.It seems the problem is related with /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh, but I don't know what it does.

I am fine with the formatter.
@cevich PTAL
It seems automation here isn't even using VMs, so the failing task and lots of other stuff can simply go away: #31
